title: Bridge Essay: What Is the Readiness Potential?

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**What Is the Readiness Potential?**. Trends Cogn Sci.. PMID: 33931306. DOI: 10.1016/j.tics.2021.04.001. The readiness potential (RP), aslow buildup of electrical potential recorded at the scalp using electroencephalography, has been associated with neural activity involved in movement preparation. It became famous thanks to Benjamin Libet, who used the time difference between the RP and self-reported time of conscious intention to move to argue that we lack free will.
